programmes.show_description: Tugann an clár faisnéise seo léargas ar an saol i Rinn Verde. (This documentary reveals the harsh realities behind Cape Verde's beauty.)
Tá sé ina fhómhar, tráth a mbíonn na laethanta ag giorrú agus na chéad stoirmeacha móra ag réabadh an chósta. (Autumn brings shorter days and big storms.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
I nDún Lúiche a bheidh Síle, baile atá suite i bparóiste Ghaoth Dobhair faoi scáth na hEaragaile. (Dún Lúiche is a small village situated under the imposing Mount Errigal.)
Sraith ina ndéantar taifeadadh ar fhíseáin cheoil ar fud na hÉireann. (This series showcases the 32 counties of Ireland through country music videos all shot on location.)
Clár tráth na gceist i nGaeilge do dhéagóirí! Choláiste Marist v Scoil Mhuire Bhun Cranncha. (Irish language teen quiz show! Marist College Athlone v Scoil Mhuire Buncrana.)
Tabharfaidh Cormac Ó hÁdhmaill cuairt ar Fháinne Cnoc Shliabh gCuillinn. (Cormac visits the Ring of Gullion.)
Clár cúrsaí reatha seachtainiúil TG4. Déanfar scagadh agus plé ar scéalta nuachta. (Politics and the economy, regional, national and international affairs.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is é Ruarc Ó Confhaola a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Ruarc Ó Confhaola.)
Ceangail do chrios! Beidh muid ag dul thart sa gcarr inniu! (Buckle up, everyone! We're going on a car ride!)
Ar meall mór cáise í an ghealach i ndáiríre? Téann JJ agus Mimi suas ar spáslong go bhfeicfidh siad. (JJ and Mimi go on a spaceship to discover if the moon is made of cheese.)
Ní chreideann Dearg é nuair a chastar Dath nua uirthi. (Red is amazed when she meets a new Colour.)
Tugann Mama cúnamh do Cory lena thogra scoile. (Mama helps Cory with his school project.)
Caithfidh an Meicneoir Gorm teacht i gcabhair ar Eric an Tochaltóir. Tá Gecko sáinnithe i dtollán. (The Blue Mechanic must save Eric the Excavator. Gecko gets stuck in a tunnel.)
Ag foghlaim faoi pháipéir nuachta a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo learns all about newspapers today.)
Tá Pip agus Posy ag iarraidh faitíos a chur ar a chéile tigh Posy. (Pip and Posy are having a spooky day at Posy's house trying to scare each other.)
Tá Iasc Mór i bhfostú i gcrann! (There is a Big Fish stuck up a tree!)
Féachann na Coileáin le seilbh a fháil ar Chnoc Mistéire dóibh féin. (The Wolfies want to takeover Mystery Mountain for themselves tonight.)
Foghlaimíonn Wussywat faoi fhrithchaitheamh nuair a fheiceann sí rud éigin ag lonrú sa ngrian. (When Wussywat sees something glinting in the sun she learns about reflections.)
Cuireann ár gcairde cúram lae do pheataí ar fáil. (Emily Elizabeth opens Clifford and Emily Elizabeth's Awesome Pet Daycare.)
Tá na cairde ag smaoineamh ar na poist a bheidh acu nuair a bheidh siad mór. (What would Woozle and Pip like to do when they grow up?)
Buaileann cara Ginger, an Brocailísár óg, cic ar an liathróid i dtreo na Fatadóin. (Ginger's baby Broccolisaurus friend kicks their ball into Potatodon territory.)
Níl áis éisteachta Ruby ag obair i gceart. (Ruby's hearing aid is not working properly.)
Tá fear bréige Bean Berg ag mealladh na n-éan in áit iad a scanrú. (The scarecrow is supposed to frighten the birds away from Mrs Bergs strawberries but it attracts them.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is maith le Lola na rudaí a fheiceann sí nuair a bhíonn sí ag faire amach a tharraingt. (Lola likes spying and observing things and then drawing them.)
Cuireann Jia an misean i mbaol nuair a dhéanann sí rud éigin gan smaoineamh ar a cuid cairde. (Jia threatens the mission by making a move that might affect her friends.)
Cabhraíonn Pat le Lola an taisce a aimsiú sula bhfaigheann na Guanos é! (Pat helps Lola to find the treasure before the Guanos do!)
Tá duine éigin níos fearr ná Angelo ag imirt cleas. (Someone is better than Angelo at pranking.)
Seinneann Dónall an t-aerghiotár. (Dónall plays air-guitar.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi na sléibhte a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the mountains.)
Téann Ceathair Déag ag clárscátáil. (Meet Extreme Fourteen, the plucky skateboarder with a clever way of getting out of trouble.)
Faigheann na Dathanna amach cé leis is cosúil iad, nó a mhalairt! (The Colours find out who they are like, or unlike!)
Tá uair na cinniúna tagtha do Bhó ach tá cúnamh uaithi! (It's Cow's big moment but she needs help!)
Tá Pompon agus Rita ag sárú ar chéile faoi thoradh ribeach. (A strange furry looking fruit, causes much debate between Pompon and Rita.)
Tá Seán le cáca a dhéanamh as salann, siúcra agus spaigití! (Today Seán makes a cake using sugar, salt and spaghetti.)
Tá Pip agus Posy le cluiche peile a imirt in éineacht lena gcairde. (Pip and Posy are at the park for a game of football with their friends.)
Clár ealaíne ina ndéanann Máire Treasa ceardaíocht agus ealaín lena cara Scú Scú Scuab. (An exciting art series where Máire Treasa does arts and crafts with Scú Scú Scuab.)
Glacann Scratch páirt i gcomórtas do mhadraí. (Scratch takes part in a dog competition.)
Tá comórtas ag Mr. Ali chun an t-uachtar reoite nua is fearr a aimsiú. (Mr. Ali hosts a contest to find the best new ice cream flavour.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina mhaoirseoir fiadhúlra le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a wildlife ranger when he grows up, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Tá togra dúlra le déanamh ag Zou agus Elzee don obair bhaile agus tá ag éirí go maith leo. (Zou & Elzee have a nature project for homework and they are doing great work.)
Téann Tiggy ag iascaireacht inniu le greim a fháil ar an iasc is úire sa loch. (Tiggy decides to go fishing today to catch the freshest fish in the lake.)
Ar an gclár inniu beidh madraí a chaitheann hataí, creimirí móra, lachain agus neart eile! (Today we'll see dogs wearing hats, rodents of unusual size, ducks and lots more!)
Seosamh Ó Cualáin iarsháirsint leis na gardaí a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín ar an gclár seo. (Seosamh Ó Cualáin will be chatting to Máirtín on this show.)
Téann muintir Malcolm agus muintir Stevie ar saoire le chéile ar bhád cónaithe. (Malcolm and Stevie's families vacation together on a houseboat.)
Faigheann Sam ealaíontóir chun portráid Diane a phéinteáil. (After an argument with Diane, Sam hires somebody to paint her portrait.)
Beidh Paudie agus Noleen O'Connor Eoin Ó Raibhaigh agus Conal Ó Gráda ar an gclár seo. (Paudie and Noeleen O'Connor, Eoin Ó Riabhaigh and Conal Ó Gráda will feature in this show.)
Caithfidh Jessica dhá dhúnmharú a réiteach chun ainm a seanchara Andy a ghlanadh. (Jessica has to solve two murders to clear the name of her old friend Deputy Andy.)

Tugann Paul Murton aghaidh ar Dùn Phris agus Gall-Ghàidhealaibh. (Paul Murton travels through Dumfries and Galloway.)

Tá Adam agus Helen tinn den trácht i Perth is tá rún acu bogadh 2000 ciliméadar ó bhaile. (Adam and Helen say they're tired of the traffic in Perth.)

Beidh na Singalings ag breathnú ar an hainmhithe agus na plandaí a bhíonn le fáil sa bhfásach. (The Singalings name all the animals that live in the desert.)

Dreapann na hOlobobanna tuar ceatha agus péinteálann siad an spéir. (The Olobobs climb a rainbow and draw in the sky with magic paint!)
Goidtear an criostal gealaí as an gceanncheathrú. (The Moon Crystal has been stolen from the PJ Masks.)

Tá fonn ar Dhubh agus ar Bhán dul ag spraoi inniu! (Black and White come to play!)

Ba mhaith le Ribín dul ag ceol in éineacht le Rocco ach níl aon cheol aici. (Ribín wants to play music with Rocco but she has a problem, her music is awful.)
Daltaí Ghaelscoil Chluain Dolcáin a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi laethanta saoire. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Baineann George an-sult as dul ag campáil den chéad uair. (George really enjoys his first camping trip.)
Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina tiománaí bus nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Muireann imagines her life as a bus driver when she grows up.)
Féachann Zou le héalú ó Mham mar nach bhfuil sé ag iarraidh dul a chodladh go fóill. (Zou does his best to avoid Mom's attention as he does not want to go to bed.)
Tá cóisir mhór eagraithe ag an Méara ach meas tú an mbeidh an bia ar fad réitithe in am ag Tiggy? (The Mayor has organised a big party but will Tiggy have all the food prepped?)
